LanguageData.VCEV_FoodVariety.description: Represents the assortment of different foods in a colonist's diet, reflecting their ability to access and consume a wide range of nutrients and flavors, calculated as an average of the variety in meals and the variety in ingredients in those meals.\n\nLow values will cause a mood penalty, while higher values will cause a mood bonus.
LanguageData.VCEV_FoodVariety.label: food variety
